name: T Engineering Corporation Public Company Limited
summary: T Engineering Corporation Public Company Limited engages in plant and building construction, and other related activities in Thailand. The company constructs industrial factories, steel-structure constructions, warehouses, condominiums, office buildings, shopping malls, hospitals, and petrochemical constructions. It also provides civil engineering services, such as civil works, reinforced concrete-structure works, steel-structure works, and architectural works, as well as installation of engineering systems, including electric, energy management, telecommunication, air conditioning, sanitation, and fire prevention systems. The company was formerly known as Thai Industrial and Engineering Service Public Company Limited and changed its name to T Engineering Corporation Public Company Limited in May 2017. The company was incorporated in 1981 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
